92.reason: [If the character after '&' or '|' is not another '&' or '|', this will incorrectly form a two-character token and miss reporting error type 'a'. Also, it may go out of bounds if i+1 exceeds string length.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [If the character after '&' or '|' is not another '&' or '|', this will incorrectly form a two-character token and miss reporting error type 'a'. Also, it may go out of bounds if i+1 exceeds string length.]

107.reason: [This causes single '&' or '|' (not followed by another) to be pushed as a valid token without checking for error 'a'. The earlier block assumes they always form '&&' or '||', but doesn't validate that.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [This causes single '&' or '|' (not followed by another) to be pushed as a valid token without checking for error 'a'. The earlier block assumes they always form '&&' or '||', but doesn't validate that.]
